message:
chore: commit pre-existing workspace changes

Commits changes that were in the working directory at session start:
- CAAM type harmonization and runner updates
- WebSocket hub enhancements
- Agent event handling improvements
- Service layer updates (output, reservation, context, history)
- BV client updates

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,4 +1,7 @@

+ *
  * Agent WebSocket Service
  *
  * Manages WebSocket connections for real-time agent state updates.
